examples: Most of the dates were bad, many epically so.
I always love the ocean and you know epically when it's raining far away, looks like a painting.
And yet, overall, the M6's design adds up: This is one big, sleek, prepossessing automobile, very mature and epically cool.
And having sat through more than a few epically long meetings in my time, I appreciated its creative managerial value.
